phase1.task_description:
Matrix multiplication returns a matrix with n1 = n2 = 1
I don't really know what we should do: in some cases, both matrices have the same n1 and n2, then the result should have n1 and n2. But sometimes they differ. I saw it happen in `MatrixGroup` when we append and build a transfer matrix: we create an identity matrix, but it has n1 = n2 = 1, and when we multiply with an element of the group (which can have n1 != n2 and both != 1), the product returns a matrix with the right ABCD components, ba
